latin: Inventor capillis erectis exclamavit: 'unum et viginti centesimae gigavattorum! quo modo tantam vim generabimus?' puer confusus rogavit quid gigavattum esset.

questions.prompt: What problem does the inventor face?

questions.target: Confused — he doesn't know what a gigawatt is
choices: Confused — he doesn't know what a gigawatt is

translation: The inventor, with his hair standing up, exclaimed: '1.21 gigawatts! How will we generate so much power?' The confused boy asked what a gigawatt was.
